title: Remove Checkboxes and Rename Title on Dictionary Page
story: As a DataTools Pro user on the Dictionary page, I want the row-selection checkboxes removed and the page title changed from 'Field Dictionary' to 'Object Dictionary', so that the interface is cleaner and the terminology is accurate.
description:
Two changes were made to the Dictionary page:

1. **Checkbox Removal**: Row-selection checkboxes were removed from the Dictionary view. These checkboxes were originally used to select rows for CSV/PDF export of selected items, but were deemed unnecessary for the Dictionary context. Checkboxes remain on the Migration view.

2. **Title Rename**: The page title was changed from 'Field Dictionary' to 'Object Dictionary' to better reflect the content scope.

The developer also noted a UX concern: on page load, all column headers briefly flash before the table finishes rendering and hides the irrelevant columns. A loading animation was suggested as a follow-up improvement.
acceptance_criteria: Dictionary page does not display row-selection checkboxes
Migration page retains its row-selection checkboxes
Dictionary page title reads 'Object Dictionary' instead of 'Field Dictionary'
CSV/PDF export functionality is not affected on Migration
ux_changes: Removed row-selection checkboxes from the Dictionary page and renamed the page title from 'Field Dictionary' to 'Object Dictionary'.
implementation_notes: Checkboxes were only removed from the Dictionary context; Migration retains them for selective export. A loading animation to prevent column header flash on initial render was suggested as a separate enhancement.
comment_summary: Developer confirmed the change was Dictionary-only (not Migration) and noted that checkboxes were used for selective CSV/PDF export. Developer also flagged a UX issue where column headers flash on page load before the table is ready, suggesting a loading animation as a future task.
